# pfsense_dnsresolver_configfiles (Data Source)

Retrieves all DNS resolver [config files](https://docs.netgate.com/pfsense/en/latest/services/dns/resolver.html). Config files contain custom Unbound configuration.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `all` (Attributes List) All config files. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--all))

<a id="nestedatt--all"></a>
### Nested Schema for `all`

Read-Only:

- `content` (String) Contents of file. Must specify Unbound clause(s). Comments start with `#` and last to the end of line.
- `name` (String) Name of config file.
